title: Long Message Buffer usage ist constantly increasing
description:
Since we upgraded our MySQL clusters (ndbcluster) from generation 7.6 to version 8.0.29 we see a coniniuosly increasing usage of the "Long Message Buffer".
This system is running since the upgrade from 7.6 to 8.0 on the 2. of July.
mysql> SELECT node_id, memory_type, total, used/total *100 as memory_used FROM ndbinfo.memoryusage;
+---------+---------------------+--------------+-------------+
| node_id | memory_type         | total        | memory_used |
+---------+---------------------+--------------+-------------+
|      10 | Data memory         | 154618822656 |      5.5944 |
|      10 | Long message buffer |     67108864 |     41.7969 |
|      11 | Data memory         | 154618822656 |      5.5949 |
|      11 | Long message buffer |     67108864 |     63.2813 |
+---------+---------------------+--------------+-------------+
We see this behaviour in bussy test systems too. The number of pages/KB of used buffer space varies over the day a little bit, but is constantly increasing long term. 
Is this expected behaviour in version 8.0.29 or a sign of a memory leak?
Is there anything, we can do about this? 
A restart of the datanodes (in test systems) resolves this only temporarily.
How to repeat:
run MySQLcluster 8.0.*
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_memory_usage (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, node_id INT NOT NULL, memory_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, total BIGINT NOT NULL, used BIGINT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_memory_usage (node_id, memory_type, total, used) VALUES (10, 'Long message buffer', 67108864, 28000000);
INSERT INTO test_memory_usage (node_id, memory_type, total, used) VALUES (11, 'Data memory', 154618822656, 10000000);
SELECT node_id, memory_type, total, used / total * 100 AS memory_used FROM test_memory_usage WHERE used > total * 0.5;
UPDATE test_memory_usage SET used = NULL WHERE node_id = 10 AND memory_type = 'Long message buffer';
key_bug_features: Increasing usage of Long Message Buffer after MySQL upgrade
